name: Holistic Asset Finance Group Co., Ltd.
business: The company operates two business lines: Digital Marketing and Video Production (providing marketing and video production services) and Products Sale and Export Trading (selling Australian-branded nutrition, health and wellness products and export trading). Its digital marketing services focus on Singapore, Taiwan, Australia and Hong Kong markets. In 2025, the company generated $1,784,075 in revenues from digital marketing and video production, accounting for 100% of total revenues, while product sales generated no revenue.
sellsTo: Singapore, Taiwan, Australia, Hong Kong and other Asian regions
individuals and companies in Taiwan for product sales (historical)

exposures.sentence: We provide marketing and video production services, including digital marketing and offline advertising, focusing on Singapore, Taiwan, Australia and Hong Kong markets.

Our video production business in part depends on the commercial success and stable supply of third-party media channels, such as YouTube, and TikTok, through which we may help our clients place custom-made short videos.

The Company is also engaged in export trading activities of various products. In 2024, the Company sold Australian-branded nutrition, health and wellness products in Taiwan, primarily through offline group-buying activities.
Our results of operations may be adversely affected by changes in foreign currency exchange rates and other risks inherent to international operations.
